notes: Bare ⟨e o⟩ surface open-mid [ɛ ɔ] (kume [kumɛ], loso [lɔsɔ] 'rice'); the imperfective TMA particle ka marks habitual aspect; araujoagostinho2010.
Bi-phonemic nasality: the coda nasal deletes and nasalizes the vowel (mpon [mpõ] 'bread', ALUSTP writes V+m before p); araujoagostinho2010.
Preverbal plural word inen with the invariant noun mina 'child' and postnominal determiner se; no number agreement on the noun; araujohagemeijer2013.
Discontinuous negation frame na … fa brackets the verb phrase; ⟨x⟩ is postalveolar [ʃ] (pixi [piʃi] 'fish'); araujohagemeijer2013.

gloss_en: The bat walks in the forest.
notes: Word-initial prenasalized onset ⟨ng⟩ [ŋɡ] (ngembu 'bat'), a substrate retention that carries the velar nasal; ⟨ê ô⟩ mark close-mid (ôbô [obo] 'forest'); araujoagostinho2010.
Affricate ⟨tx⟩ [tʃ] (notxi [nɔtʃi] 'night'); nasal coda deletes on the pronoun non [nõ] 'we'; araujoagostinho2010.
Labial-velar stop ⟨gb⟩ [ɡ͡b], an Edoid substrate retention (gbêgbê 'a snail sp.'); sa is the copula; tamen [tamẽ] 'big' shows biphonemic nasality; araujoagostinho2010.
Affricate ⟨tx⟩ [tʃ] with a nasalized vowel (kentxi [kẽtʃi] 'hot'); copula sa; postnominal determiner se; araujohagemeijer2013.
Plural word inen plus invariant ome 'man' (open-mid [ɔmɛ]) and postnominal se; the noun takes no plural inflection; araujohagemeijer2013.

gloss_en: You take the glass and give it to me.
notes: Serial verb construction toma … da 'take … give'; bare ⟨o⟩ open-mid (toma [tɔma], kopu [kɔpu] 'glass'); object pronoun mu 'me'; araujohagemeijer2013.
Coda ⟨x⟩ is the palato-alveolar [ʃ], the only licit non-nasal coda (mlaxka [mlaʃka] 'mask'); imperfective ka; araujoagostinho2010.
Affricate ⟨dj⟩ [dʒ] (djêlu [dʒelu] 'money'); the discontinuous na … fa frame negates the clause; possessive mu; araujohagemeijer2013.
Affricate ⟨tx⟩ [tʃ] (kitxiba [kitʃiba] 'silver banana'); imperfective ka with the first-person subject clitic n; araujoagostinho2010.
Anterior/past TMA particle tava; nasalized vowel from a nasal coda (kanta [kãta] 'sing'); locative ni 'in'; araujohagemeijer2013.
Polar question marked by intonation alone, with no word-order change; imperfective ka; open-mid loso [lɔsɔ] 'rice'; araujohagemeijer2013.
Discontinuous negation na … fa around a bare verb; subject pronoun non [nõ] 'we' shows the deleted nasal coda; araujohagemeijer2013.
Word-final coda ⟨x⟩ realizes as [ʃ] (box [bɔʃ] 'good', from boas); affricate ⟨dj⟩ [dʒ]; a fixed greeting; araujoagostinho2010.
Single alveolar tap [ɾ] (funxônariu 'official'); plural word inen with an invariant noun; no tap/trill contrast; araujoagostinho2010.
Bare-verb imperative toma 'take'; postnominal determiner se; open-mid ⟨o⟩ (kopu [kɔpu] 'glass'); araujohagemeijer2013.

gloss_en: He was sitting in the forest.
notes: Anterior TMA tava; biphonemic nasality (tason [tasõ] 'to sit'); close-mid ⟨ô⟩ (ôbô [obo] 'forest'); araujoagostinho2010.
